name: velvet-studio
description: Premium AI Model Management & Image Generation Studio
author: ledocsoff

scripts.predev: lsof -ti:5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -n server,vite,electron -c yellow,cyan,magenta "node server.js" "vite --open false" "sleep 3 && ELECTRON_DEV=true npx electron ."
scripts.electron:build: vite build && npx esbuild server.js --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/server.cjs && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.json
scripts.electron:pack: vite build && npx esbuild server.js --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/server.cjs && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --dir
scripts.update: echo '⏳ Mise a jour Velvet Studio...' && git pull origin master && npm install --omit=dev && npm run build && echo '✅ Mise a jour terminee (v'$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")')'
